glosses.vi: sự phát triển; phát triển (phần mềm/khu vực)

translations.es: No me gusta cómo van las cosas.
translations.fr: Je n'aime pas la tournure que ça prend.
translations.it: Non mi piace come stanno andando le cose.
translations.ko: 상황이 이렇게 흘러가는 게 마음에 들지 않아.
translations.ru: Мне не нравится, как всё развивается.
translations.pt: Não gosto de como as coisas estão indo.
translations.vi: Tôi không thích cách mọi chuyện đang tiến triển.
translations.nl: Ik vind het niet leuk hoe dit gaat.
translations.uk: Мені не подобається, як усе розвивається.
translations.hu: Nem tetszik, ahogy alakulnak a dolgok.
translations.hi: मुझे चीज़ों का यह रुख पसंद नहीं है.
translations.pl: Nie podoba mi się, jak to się rozwija.
translations.el: Δεν μου αρέσει η τροπή που παίρνουν τα πράγματα.
translations.nb: Jeg liker ikke hvordan dette utvikler seg.
translations.id: Saya tidak suka arah perkembangan ini.
translations.sv: Jag gillar inte vart det här är på väg.
translations.cs: Nelíbí se mi, jak se to vyvíjí.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke lide, hvordan det udvikler sig.
translations.fi: En pidä siitä, mihin suuntaan tämä on menossa.
translations.ja: この流れは好きじゃない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the noun 'Entwicklung' as definite; feminine nominative singular; functions as determiner of the subject NP.
Feminine noun; head of the subject NP; nominative singular; the thing that pleases.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a nominative subject ('Die Entwicklung') and a dative experiencer ('mir').
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; experiencer of 'gefällt'.
Negation particle; negates the predicate 'gefällt mir'.

sentences.target: Wir beobachten die Entwicklung ganz genau.

translations.de: Wir beobachten die Entwicklung ganz genau.
translations.en: We are closely watching the development.
translations.es: Estamos siguiendo de cerca la situación.
translations.fr: Nous suivons la situation de très près.
translations.it: Stiamo seguendo da vicino la situazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在密切关注事态发展。
translations.yue: 我哋正密切留意情況嘅發展。
translations.ru: Мы внимательно следим за развитием ситуации.
translations.pt: Estamos acompanhando de perto a situação.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang theo dõi sát tình hình.
translations.nl: We volgen de ontwikkelingen op de voet.
translations.uk: Ми уважно стежимо за розвитком подій.
translations.hi: हम स्थिति पर कड़ी नज़र रख रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 状況を注意深く見守っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, 1st person plural present; transitive, selecting an accusative object ('die Entwicklung').
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object 'Entwicklung'.
Feminine noun; head of the direct object NP; accusative singular.
Degree adverb intensifying 'genau'.
Adverb modifying 'beobachten'; together with 'ganz' expresses the manner ('very exactly/closely').

sentences.target: Die Entwicklung im Projekt macht mich nervös.
sentences.reading: /diː ɛntˈvɪklʊŋ ɪm pʁoˈjɛkt maxt mɪç nɛʁˈvøːs/

translations.de: Die Entwicklung im Projekt macht mich nervös.
translations.ipa: /diː ɛntˈvɪklʊŋ ɪm pʁoˈjɛkt maxt mɪç nɛʁˈvøːs/
translations.en: The development in the project makes me nervous.
translations.es: Me inquieta cómo va el proyecto.
translations.yue: 個項目嘅進展令我好緊張。
translations.pt: O andamento do projeto me preocupa.
translations.vi: Diễn biến của dự án khiến tôi lo lắng.
translations.nl: Het verloop van het project maakt me zenuwachtig.
translations.hi: प्रोजेक्ट की प्रगति मुझे बेचैन करती है.
translations.el: Η πορεία του έργου με αγχώνει.
translations.nb: Utviklingen i prosjektet gjør meg nervøs.
translations.id: Perkembangan proyek itu membuat saya cemas.
translations.sv: Utvecklingen i projektet gör mig orolig.
translations.da: Udviklingen i projektet gør mig nervøs.
translations.ja: プロジェクトの進み具合に不安を感じます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of subject 'Entwicklung'.
Feminine noun; head of the subject NP; nominative singular.
Preposition governing dative; begins the PP 'im Projekt' modifying 'Entwicklung'. (Contraction 'im' = 'in dem'.)
Definite article; dative singular (neuter here); determiner of 'Projekt' after 'in'.
Neuter noun; object of the preposition 'in'; dative singular within the PP modifying 'Entwicklung'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; causative use with object 'mich' and object complement 'nervös'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; direct object affected by 'macht'.
Predicate adjective serving as object complement, describing the resulting state of 'mich'.

sentences.target: Ich freue mich über die Entwicklung.

translations.de: Ich freue mich über die Entwicklung.
translations.es: Me alegra cómo van las cosas.
translations.fr: Je suis content de la tournure que ça prend.
translations.it: Sono contento di come stanno andando le cose.
translations.zh-Hans: 我对目前的进展感到高兴。
translations.yue: 我對而家嘅發展感到開心。
translations.vi: Tôi vui về tiến triển này.
translations.nl: Ik ben blij met deze ontwikkeling.
translations.hi: मुझे इस प्रगति से खुशी है.
translations.pl: Cieszę się z takiego obrotu spraw.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; used reflexively ('sich freuen') and selects a PP with 'über'.
Reflexive pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; required object of 'freuen' in reflexive construction.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the complement PP indicating the cause/topic of joy.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Entwicklung' as object of the preposition.
Feminine noun; object of 'über'; accusative singular within the PP.
